channel.title: Glasgow Azure User Group
channel.description: Recent content on Glasgow Azure User Group

item.description: A look back at 2026 events and who our speakers were.

item.title: An update on the Glasgow Azure User Group
item.description: A personal update from Sarah, posted 9 July 2026. Hi everyone,

item.title: Code of Conduct
item.description: Code of Conduct This code of conduct outlines our expectations for participants within the Glasgow Azure User Group community, as well as steps to reporting unacceptable behaviour.

item.title: Contact Us
item.description: Why You Should Contact Us We’re excited to hear from you!

item.title: Events
item.description: Join us at an event We aim to hold a meetup every two months, all free at the point of use thanks to the continued support of our sponsors.

item.title: Organisers
item.description: The organisers of this group dedicate their time and passion outside of their regular work to support the IT community in Glasgow and the wider community in Scotland.

item.title: Privacy Policy
item.description: With thanks to Writers’ HQ, our supreme writing commanders, glorious leaders and excellent but tiny overlords, who have verily granted us permission to use their splendid and sweary Privacy Policy.

item.title: Sponsors
item.description: Sponsors We are looking forward to working with the following partners to bring you the Glasgow Azure User Group events.
